info.title: Contest Rating API
info.description: HTTP contract for the contest route handlers. The browser app uses this API for all data access (reads and writes). Firebase Auth Bearer tokens authenticate requests; the Admin SDK verifies them server-side. The only direct Firestore client usage is onSnapshot for real-time contest subscriptions.

FirebaseBearer.description: Firebase ID token for admin-only HTTP endpoints. Same-origin browser requests may also authenticate via the __session cookie.

RoundStatus.description: Computed round status derived from constituent matchup phases

AttributeConfig.description: Configuration for a single scoring attribute

ContestConfig.description: Configuration defining the contest type and scoring attributes

ContestConfigItem.description: Stored contest configuration with unique ID

CreateContestConfigBody.description: Configuration defining the contest type and scoring attributes

ScoreBreakdown.description: Dynamic score breakdown — keys are attribute IDs from the contest config

matchupId.description: Matchup this score is cast against. Required.

userName.description: Display name for auto-registered voter (defaults to token display name)

categoryId.description: Single category to update (must match a config attribute ID)

description.example: A refreshing citrus cocktail with a hint of lavender

sumScore.description: Aggregate: sum of all vote totals for this entry

Entry.description: A contest entry (drink, chili, cosplay, performance, etc.)

description.example: A refreshing citrus cocktail with a hint of lavender

sumScore.description: Aggregate: sum of all vote totals for this entry

description.example: A refreshing citrus cocktail with a hint of lavender

sumScore.description: Aggregate: sum of all vote totals for this entry

adminOverride.description: Admin escape hatch. 'active' forces the round open; 'closed' forces it closed; null/undefined uses computed status.

entryIds.description: Entries competing in this matchup (length 2 for 1v1).

Matchup.description: A first-class matchup between entries within a round.

entryIds.description: Entries competing in this matchup (length 2 for 1v1).
Entries competing in this matchup (length 2 for 1v1).

entryIdPairs.description: Explicit entry pairs for round-1 seeding. Omit for rounds > 1 (propagated from previous round winners).

UserProfile.description: User profile document. Writes are only possible through the API; clients may read their own document.

idToken.description: Firebase ID token obtained client-side via `user.getIdToken()`

CreateSessionBody.description: Payload for POST /auth/session. The server exchanges the ID token for a long-lived session cookie so server-rendered pages can authenticate the user.

get.description: Returns the current/default contest for public display
Returns all contests and the current default contest. Optionally filter by slug.

200.description: Contest list or a single contest when filtering by slug

404.description: Contest not found (when filtering by slug)

get.description: Returns a single contest by ID or slug.

patch.description: Updates an existing contest. Admin only.

delete.description: Deletes a contest by ID. Admin only.

get.description: Returns all entries for a contest.

post.summary: Add an entry to a contest
post.description: Creates a new entry in the contest. Admin only.

example.name: Midnight Mojito
example.description: A dark twist on the classic mojito

get.description: Returns a single entry by ID.

patch.description: Updates an existing entry. Admin only.

delete.description: Removes an entry from the contest. Admin only.

get.description: Returns scores for a contest. Filter by entryId and/or userId. Scores are stored in a votes subcollection.

post.description: Submits or updates a score via the votes subcollection. The userId is derived from the verified Bearer token, not the request body. Accepts either a full breakdown or a single category/value pair and auto-registers the voter if not already known.

matchupId.description: Matchup this score is cast against. The matchup must be in the 'shake' phase and must include entryId.

userName.description: Display name for auto-registered voter (defaults to token display name)

categoryId.description: Single category to update (must match a config attribute ID)

value.message: Score breakdown or categoryId + value is required.

post.description: Registers the authenticated user as a competitor in the contest. Optionally creates an entry. The userId is derived from the verified Bearer token, not the request body.

displayName.description: Display name for the voter record

entryName.description: Optional entry name to create alongside registration

get.description: Returns all matchups for a contest, optionally filtered by roundId.

parameters.name: roundId
parameters.description: Return only matchups belonging to this round

post.description: Creates a new matchup within a round. Admin only.

patch.description: Updates a matchup's phase, entries, winner, or advancement pointers. Admin only.
Updates name, number, or adminOverride on a round. Round status itself is computed from matchup phases; use adminOverride to force-open or force-close. Admin only.

post.description: Seeds a round. For round 1, the admin supplies explicit entry pairs; for rounds N>1, pairs are derived from previous-round winners (all must be scored). Replaces any existing matchups for the round and backfills advancement pointers on the previous round. Admin only.

400.description: Invalid request or invalid previous-round state

get.description: Returns all contest configurations from the datastore.

post.description: Creates a new contest configuration. Admin only.

get.description: Returns a single configuration by ID.

patch.description: Updates an existing configuration. Admin only.

delete.description: Removes a configuration from the datastore. Admin only.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile document.

404.description: Profile not found (user has not registered a profile yet)

patch.description: Updates fields on the authenticated user's profile. `role` cannot be changed via this endpoint.

post.summary: Create (or fetch) the current user's profile
post.description: Idempotent. Called by the client after signup/sign-in to ensure a profile document exists. Returns the existing profile if one already exists, otherwise creates a new profile with role=voter.

post.summary: Exchange an ID token for a session cookie
post.description: Called by the client after login and on ID token refresh. The server verifies the ID token and issues a long-lived (7 day) `__session` cookie so server-rendered pages (e.g. `/admin`) can authenticate the user. API routes continue to use the short-lived `Authorization: Bearer <idToken>` header; this cookie is specifically for same-origin server navigation.

200.description: Session cookie created. Response includes `Set-Cookie: __session=...; HttpOnly; Path=/; SameSite=Lax; Max-Age=604800` (and `Secure` in production).

401.description: ID token is invalid or expired

500.description: Firebase Admin SDK is not configured on the server

delete.description: Clears the `__session` cookie. Requires auth so an unauthenticated caller cannot clear a cookie they do not own.

tags.name: Entries
tags.description: Manage entries within contests (drinks, chilies, cosplays, etc.)

tags.name: Scores
tags.description: Submit and retrieve scores from the votes subcollection

tags.name: ContestConfigs
tags.description: Manage contest configuration templates and scoring attributes
